label: 边缘绿簇
description: 在指定区域（targetValue 掩码）的边缘处生成若干形状不规则的绿簇：沿区域外轮廓取边缘种子，每个种子向区域内部有机生长成一团不规则像素块，粘附在内缘上。可控簇数量、大小、大小方差与形状破碎度。
description-en: Generate irregularly shaped green clusters along the edge of a target region (targetValue mask): seeds are sampled along the region's outer contour, and each grows an organic blob inward, hugging the inner edge. Controls cluster count, size, size variance, and shape irregularity.
icon: 扁平插画风格小图标。一块浅色地块的边缘上粘附着几团深绿色不规则小斑块，斑块边缘呈有机锯齿状，主色2种。

inputs.name: inputGrid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 单张二维网格（grid[y][x]）；在其 targetValue 区域的边缘生成绿簇。网格列表由引擎按 DataTree 自动逐张 fanout。
inputs.description-en: A single 2D grid (grid[y][x]); clusters are generated along the edge of its targetValue region. The engine fans out a DataTree of grids one-by-one.

inputs.name: targetValue
inputs.label: 目标区域值
inputs.description: 要沿其边缘生成绿簇的区域掩码值
inputs.description-en: Mask value of the region whose edge gets clusters.

inputs.name: count
inputs.label: 簇数量
inputs.description: 沿边缘生成的绿簇数量（沿轮廓等距分布并带抖动）
inputs.description-en: Number of clusters along the edge (evenly spaced along the contour with jitter).

inputs.name: clusterSize
inputs.label: 簇大小
inputs.description: 每个绿簇的平均像素数（实际受 sizeVariance 浮动）
inputs.description-en: Average cell count per cluster (varied by sizeVariance).

inputs.name: sizeVariance
inputs.label: 大小方差
inputs.description: 簇大小的随机浮动比例 0~1，0=全等大，1=±100%

inputs.name: irregularity
inputs.label: 形状破碎度
inputs.description: 簇形状的不规则/破碎程度 0~1，0=较圆整，1=极不规则有触须
inputs.description-en: Shape irregularity 0~1; 0 = rounder, 1 = very ragged with tendrils.

inputs.name: outputValue
inputs.label: 输出码值
inputs.description: 写入绿簇像素的网格值（背景为 0）
inputs.description-en: Grid value written for cluster cells (background is 0).

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 使用当前时间戳

outputs.name: outputGrid
outputs.label: 输出网格
outputs.description: 与输入同形状的绿簇掩码网格（背景 0，簇 = outputValue）；可直接喂 grid2node 转场景。
outputs.description-en: Cluster mask grid with the same shape as the input (background 0, clusters = outputValue); feed into grid2node.
